title: Fix false positives in cursor-based audit compliance reads
summary: readAuditLogWindowed drops earlier in-window get_rules events after the first call, which can mark compliant edits as violations.

title: Align fab_update_registry priority input with agents.meta schema
summary: fab_update_registry accepts numeric priority while agentsMetaNodeSchema only accepts high|medium|low, making priority updates fail end-to-end.

title: Stop MCP transport events from breaking ledger-append dedupe
summary: When .intent-ledger.jsonl ends with kind=mcp-event, ledger-append duplicate suppression misses the latest real commit entry.

title: Dispose HTTP cache watchers on server shutdown
summary: createFabricHttpApp creates a chokidar watcher with no shutdown hook, which can leak watchers and timers across restart cycles.
